elements.sent-2411-001: We investigate the average number of lattice points within a ball for the $n$th cyclotomic number field, where the lattice is chosen at random from the set of unit determinant ideal lattices of the field.
elements.sent-2411-002: We show that this average is nearly identical to the average number of lattice points in a ball among all unit determinant random lattices of the same dimension.
elements.sent-2411-003: To establish this result, we apply the Hecke integration formula and subconvexity bounds on Dedekind zeta functions of cyclotomic fields.
elements.sent-2411-004: The symmetries arising from the roots of unity in an ideal lattice allow us to improve a lattice packing bound by Venkatesh, achieving an enhancement by a factor of 2.
